episodes.title: Inside the Children of God Cult - Abuse, Scandal and Survival
episodes.description:
Uncover the disturbing truth behind the Children of God cult - from shocking abuse to apocalyptic prophecies, this deep dive reveals the real story of David Berg’s infamous sect.

This video explores the dark legacy of the Children of God, a doomsday cult founded by David Berg in 1960s California. What began as a seemingly harmless "Jesus freak" movement soon devolved into a global organization marked by disturbing practices: child abuse, flirty fishing (religious prostitution), brainwashing, and a twisted doctrine known as the "Law of Love." Survivors share harrowing firsthand accounts of indoctrination, sexual exploitation, and psychological trauma, exposing how Berg’s teachings destroyed lives and families. The story traces the rise of the cult, the manipulative charisma of its leader, and the far-reaching impact of his crimes - including the tragic case of Ricky Rodriguez and the ongoing struggle for justice.

Through interviews, archival footage, and survivor testimony, the video reveals how the Children of God (now known as The Family International) operated in secrecy, used religious texts to justify unspeakable acts, and evaded legal consequences for decades. Viewers will learn how cult dynamics trap members, the challenges faced by those who escape, and the ongoing efforts to confront the group’s past. This documentary is essential viewing for anyone interested in cults, religious abuse, or the resilience of survivors.

#Cults #ChildrenOfGod #DavidBerg #ReligiousAbuse #TrueCrime #SurvivorStories #FlirtyFishing #TheFamilyInternational
